# PREME Home Loans — Funding for Modern Real Estate Investors

> PREME Home Loans provides financing built for real estate investors: DSCR loans, fix & flip loans, bridge loans, and business credit. Qualification is based on the deal and the property's cash flow — no tax returns required — with closings in 7–14 days.

## Loan programs

- **DSCR loans**: long-term rental financing qualified on the property's rental income (debt-service coverage ratio), not your personal income. No tax returns, no W-2s.
- **Fix & flip loans**: short-term financing for purchase plus rehab on value-add projects.
- **Bridge loans**: fast short-term capital to close quickly or unlock equity between transactions.
- **Business credit**: credit lines for real estate investing businesses.

## Who it's for

Real estate investors — from first rental property to scaling a portfolio — who need speed and deal-based underwriting instead of bank-style income documentation. Self-employed and full-time investors welcome.

## Why investors choose PREME

- No tax returns or personal income verification — the deal qualifies, not your W-2
- Close in 7–14 days
- Investor-first process: apply online, get terms fast, portal to track your loan

- [Loan programs](https://www.premerealestate.com/loan-programs): full program details

- [Deal calculator](https://www.premerealestate.com/calculator): run your numbers
- [About](https://www.premerealestate.com/about): who we are
- [Blog](https://www.premerealestate.com/blog): investor financing guides
- [Get prequalified](https://www.premerealestate.com/prequalify): start in minutes
- [Apply](https://www.premerealestate.com/apply): full application
- [Contact](https://www.premerealestate.com/contact): talk to us
